text.title: Action Item Carryover Tracker Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Action Item Carryover Tracker.

example.scenario: Solo founder running weekly standup + biweekly 1:1s. One Notion DB; 30 items live, 6 stale (carryover ≥3); Friday report shows 4 are 'waiting on client', 2 are 'unscheduled'. Founder kills 3, escalates 3.
